title: Magicborn: The Rune Path
author: Ben Garrard
description: Kael’s road out of Tarro’s service — a hidden route between kingdoms, strength earned in steps, and runes carved for the next person who runs.

title: Mordred's Legacy
author: Ben Garrard
description: A dark fantasy sequel. Alun, the child who does not remember, and the world that will not let him forget.

title: Mordred's Tale
author: Ben Garrard
description: A dark fantasy novel. Morgana, Jack, and the threads of fate.
